corporate.cap_table: Series C (2023) at $390M post; preferred has 1x non-participating liquidation preference; standard broad-based weighted-average anti-dilution
corporate.key_person: CTO co-founder holds critical AI IP knowledge; no documented bus-factor mitigation

ip.invention_assignment: in place for employees; TWO 2025 contractors have NO signed IP assignment (the enrichment + analytics modules)
ip.oss_compliance: one AGPL dependency in the analytics service — copyleft obligation not addressed
ip.trademarks: word mark registered US; not registered EU
ip.patents: none filed on the AI sequencing method (disclosed publicly 5 months ago -> 12-month provisional clock running)

material_contracts.largest_customer_msa: 9% of ARR; uncapped IP indemnity in favor of the customer; renewal in 7 months; change-of-control consent required
material_contracts.liability_caps: standard 12-month fee cap on most paper, BUT the top-customer MSA is uncapped on IP
material_contracts.change_of_control: 4 of top-10 contracts require counterparty consent on a change of control

data_privacy.dpa_status: in place with most subprocessors; TWO subprocessors (enrichment vendor + email-delivery vendor) have NO DPA
data_privacy.data_residency: all EU data stored in us-east-1 — no EU residency option offered
data_privacy.ai_personal_data: AI feature trains + infers on EU personal data with no documented lawful basis / retention policy

certifications.soc2_type2: report exists; ONE exception (access-review control skipped a cycle in the observation period)
certifications.gdpr_program: informal; no Art. 30 records of processing; no DPIA on the AI feature

regulatory_triggers: AI deployed on EU personal data -> EU AI Act surface (risk-tiered) + GDPR Art. 22 / DPIA
Enterprise B2B SaaS procurement -> SOC 2 + (often) ISO 27001 expected by buyers
source: general-counsel-advisor (contract review, IP strategy, regulatory trigger table) + gc-review six questions (IP ownership, liability/indemnity, data/DPA, termination/renewal, regulatory surface, employment/equity)
